requirement_topic.en: Namibia Grid-Connection Gates — NSI Conformity, ECB Licensing, NamPower/RED Connection, IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 纳米比亚并网门槛——NSI合格评定、ECB许可、NamPower/RED接入、IEC 62116、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: 納米比亞併網門檻——NSI合格評定、ECB許可、NamPower/RED接入、IEC 62116、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V參數

summary.en: Grid-tied solar PV inverters for Namibia must be treated as project-specific equipment, not as automatically accepted consumer electronics. The practical approval chain is NSI conformity where Namibian standards adopt or reference IEC standards, ECB licensing or regulatory treatment for generation, supply, IPP, and net-metering projects, and connection approval by NamPower or the relevant Regional Electricity Distributor such as CENORED or Erongo RED. Namibia uses a 50 Hz low-voltage supply commonly described as 220/380 V, so inverter firmware, voltage and frequency trip thresholds, reconnection timing, anti-islanding behaviour, and utility-interface functions should be validated for Namibian settings. IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence are core grid-connection documents for grid-tied PV inverters.
summary.zh: 进入纳米比亚的并网太阳能光伏逆变器应按项目设备处理，而不能视为自动接受的普通消费电子产品。实际审批链条是：在纳米比亚标准采纳或引用IEC标准时满足NSI合格评定要求；针对发电、供电、IPP及净计量项目确认ECB许可或监管处理；并取得NamPower或相关区域电力配电商（如CENORED、Erongo RED）的接入批准。纳米比亚低压供电通常描述为50 Hz、220/380 V，因此逆变器固件、电压和频率跳闸阈值、重连时间、防孤岛行为及公用电网接口功能应按纳米比亚参数验证。IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口证据是并网光伏逆变器的核心并网文件。
summary.zht: 進入納米比亞的併網太陽能光伏逆變器應按項目設備處理，而不能視為自動接受的普通消費電子產品。實際審批鏈條是：在納米比亞標準採納或引用IEC標準時滿足NSI合格評定要求；針對發電、供電、IPP及淨計量項目確認ECB許可或監管處理；並取得NamPower或相關區域電力配電商（如CENORED、Erongo RED）的接入批准。納米比亞低壓供電通常描述為50 Hz、220/380 V，因此逆變器韌體、電壓和頻率跳脫閾值、重連時間、防孤島行為及公用電網介面功能應按納米比亞參數驗證。IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面證據是併網光伏逆變器的核心併網文件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
ECB licensing and regulatory treatment for electricity generation, supply, IPP, and net-metering projects
NamPower or relevant Regional Electricity Distributor connection approval for grid-tied systems
Namibia low-voltage grid context commonly stated as 220/380 V, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408-2021, domestic anti-islanding reports, and factory grid-code settings for China. Those documents are based on Chinese regulatory acceptance and Chinese grid-connection practice. They do not create approval by NSI, ECB, NamPower, or a Namibian RED and should not be presented as a substitute for Namibia project acceptance without IEC test evidence and Namibia-specific firmware validation.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021、国内防孤岛报告及中国出厂电网代码参数。上述文件基于中国监管验收和中国并网实践，不会形成NSI、ECB、NamPower或纳米比亚RED的批准，也不应在没有IEC测试证据及纳米比亚特定固件验证的情况下作为纳米比亚项目验收替代文件。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408-2021、國內防孤島報告及中國出廠電網代碼參數。上述文件基於中國監管驗收和中國併網實踐，不會形成NSI、ECB、NamPower或納米比亞RED的批准，也不應在沒有IEC測試證據及納米比亞特定韌體驗證的情況下作為納米比亞項目驗收替代文件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China-side GB/T and NB/T evidence does not satisfy the Namibia approval chain by itself. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding reports, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, a documented Namibia grid-code setting file for 50 Hz 220/380 V operation, and project documentation for the ECB and NamPower/RED review path. Where grid parameters differ from the Chinese factory default, the setting change should be controlled, recorded, and retested if required by the utility or project engineer.
gap.zh: 差距：中国侧GB/T和NB/T证据本身不满足纳米比亚审批链。出口商应准备IEC 62116防孤岛报告、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、针对50 Hz 220/380 V运行的纳米比亚电网代码参数文件，以及用于ECB和NamPower/RED审查路径的项目文件。若并网参数不同于中国出厂默认设置，应对设置变更进行控制和记录，并在公用事业单位或项目工程师要求时重新测试。
gap.zht: 差距：中國側GB/T和NB/T證據本身不滿足納米比亞審批鏈。出口商應準備IEC 62116防孤島報告、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、針對50 Hz 220/380 V運行的納米比亞電網代碼參數文件，以及用於ECB和NamPower/RED審查路徑的項目文件。若併網參數不同於中國出廠預設設置，應對設置變更進行控制和記錄，並在公用事業單位或項目工程師要求時重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-tied PV projects: NSI conformity expectations, ECB regulatory treatment, and NamPower/RED connection approval are project gates before energisation
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China-side regulatory and grid-operator review only; it is not transferable to Namibia without project acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat NSI conformity, ECB licensing or regulatory treatment, and NamPower/RED connection approval as separate Namibia gates. Chinese GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 37408-2021 documents do not automatically satisfy IEC 62116, IEC 61727, or Namibia utility acceptance. Validate the inverter configuration for Namibia's 50 Hz 220/380 V network before project submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将NSI合格评定、ECB许可或监管处理、NamPower/RED接入批准视为纳米比亚的独立门槛。中国GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408-2021文件不会自动满足IEC 62116、IEC 61727或纳米比亚公用事业验收要求。项目提交前请按纳米比亚50 Hz 220/380 V电网验证逆变器配置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將NSI合格評定、ECB許可或監管處理、NamPower/RED接入批准視為納米比亞的獨立門檻。中國GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408-2021文件不會自動滿足IEC 62116、IEC 61727或納米比亞公用事業驗收要求。項目提交前請按納米比亞50 Hz 220/380 V電網驗證逆變器配置。

requirement_topic.en: Namibia Solar Market Context — Modified Single Buyer, IPP/Utility-Scale Projects, Rooftop Net Metering, Import Dependence, and Green Hydrogen
requirement_topic.zh: 纳米比亚太阳能市场背景——修改后的单一买方、IPP/公用事业规模项目、屋顶净计量、进口依赖及绿色氢能
requirement_topic.zht: 納米比亞太陽能市場背景——修改後的單一買方、IPP/公用事業規模項目、屋頂淨計量、進口依賴及綠色氫能

summary.en: Namibia has some of the world's strongest solar resources and is using solar PV to reduce heavy electricity import dependence, including imports historically sourced from South Africa's Eskom and regional power pools. Market access is project-driven: utility-scale projects, IPPs under the modified single-buyer framework, NamPower procurement, RED or municipal distribution projects, and rooftop net-metering installations can each impose different documentation routes. Green-hydrogen ambitions increase the importance of bankable IEC documentation because large renewable generation and electrolysis projects often use lender and offtaker technical specifications in addition to national approval gates.
summary.zh: 纳米比亚拥有世界领先的太阳能资源，正利用太阳能光伏降低对进口电力的高度依赖，包括历史上来自南非Eskom和区域电力市场的电力。市场准入按项目驱动：公用事业规模项目、修改后的单一买方框架下的IPP、NamPower采购、RED或市政配电项目、屋顶净计量装置，均可能适用不同文件路径。绿色氢能愿景提升了可融资IEC文件的重要性，因为大型可再生能源和电解项目通常除国家审批门槛外，还采用贷款方和购电方技术规格。
summary.zht: 納米比亞擁有世界領先的太陽能資源，正利用太陽能光伏降低對進口電力的高度依賴，包括歷史上來自南非Eskom和區域電力市場的電力。市場准入按項目驅動：公用事業規模項目、修改後的單一買方框架下的IPP、NamPower採購、RED或市政配電項目、屋頂淨計量裝置，均可能適用不同文件路徑。綠色氫能願景提升了可融資IEC文件的重要性，因為大型可再生能源和電解項目通常除國家審批門檻外，還採用貸款方和購電方技術規格。

standards_or_laws: ECB regulation of electricity generation, transmission, distribution, supply, import, and export licensing
NamPower procurement and connection processes for national utility projects
Regional Electricity Distributor and municipal distribution connection requirements
Project-owner, lender, and offtaker specifications for IPP, utility-scale solar, and green-hydrogen-linked renewable generation

summary.en: China domestic acceptance may include Chinese grid-code certificates, voluntary CQC or CGC inverter certification, and project-owner approvals under Chinese utility practice. These documents can help demonstrate manufacturing maturity but are not Namibia market-entry approvals. For Namibian IPP, NamPower, RED, rooftop, or hydrogen-linked projects, the acceptance package should be rebuilt around the Namibian regulator, the connecting utility, and project finance specifications.
summary.zh: 中国国内验收可能包括中国并网标准证书、自愿性CQC或CGC逆变器认证及中国公用事业实践下的项目业主批准。这些文件可用于证明制造成熟度，但不是纳米比亚市场准入批准。对于纳米比亚IPP、NamPower、RED、屋顶或氢能相关项目，应围绕纳米比亚监管机构、接入公用事业单位及项目融资规格重新构建验收文件包。
summary.zht: 中國國內驗收可能包括中國併網標準證書、自願性CQC或CGC逆變器認證及中國公用事業實踐下的項目業主批准。這些文件可用於證明製造成熟度，但不是納米比亞市場准入批准。對於納米比亞IPP、NamPower、RED、屋頂或氫能相關項目，應圍繞納米比亞監管機構、接入公用事業單位及項目融資規格重新構建驗收文件包。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: Namibia's solar push does not mean automatic inverter acceptance. The supplier should identify the exact route first: NamPower utility-scale procurement, IPP PPA, RED or municipal distribution connection, rooftop net metering, or hydrogen-linked renewable supply. Each route can require separate model approvals, grid studies, protection settings, commissioning tests, and documentation from IEC laboratories.
gap.zh: 差距：纳米比亚推动太阳能发展并不意味着逆变器自动被接受。供应商应首先识别具体路径：NamPower公用事业规模采购、IPP购电协议、RED或市政配电接入、屋顶净计量，或氢能相关可再生能源供电。每一路径均可能要求单独的型号批准、电网研究、保护设置、调试测试及IEC实验室文件。
gap.zht: 差距：納米比亞推動太陽能發展並不意味著逆變器自動被接受。供應商應首先識別具體路徑：NamPower公用事業規模採購、IPP購電協議、RED或市政配電接入、屋頂淨計量，或氫能相關可再生能源供電。每一路徑均可能要求單獨的型號批准、電網研究、保護設置、調試測試及IEC實驗室文件。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commercially mandatory: the ECB, NamPower, RED, municipality, project owner, lender, and offtaker route determines the required inverter acceptance package
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic project approvals and voluntary certifications are supporting evidence only and do not replace Namibia route-specific approvals

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Namibia's strong solar resource, import-reduction policy drivers, modified single-buyer market, rooftop net-metering activity, and green-hydrogen ambitions make solar attractive, but they do not remove the approval gates. Confirm the exact ECB, NamPower, RED, municipal, lender, and offtaker route before relying on any China-side inverter certificate.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 纳米比亚优越的太阳能资源、降低进口依赖的政策动力、修改后的单一买方市场、屋顶净计量活动及绿色氢能愿景使太阳能具备吸引力，但不会取消审批门槛。在依赖任何中国侧逆变器证书前，请确认具体的ECB、NamPower、RED、市政、贷款方及购电方路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 納米比亞優越的太陽能資源、降低進口依賴的政策動力、修改後的單一買方市場、屋頂淨計量活動及綠色氫能願景使太陽能具備吸引力，但不會取消審批門檻。在依賴任何中國側逆變器證書前，請確認具體的ECB、NamPower、RED、市政、貸款方及購電方路徑。
